instruction: Return ONLY a JSON object with keys argumentSummary, stressSummary, strongestConsensus, disproofCondition, references, confidence, openQuestion. argumentSummary must question r1-msg-001. stressSummary must be a stress_test that counters r1-msg-001 and names the stale cleanup / missing response failure mode.

content.summary: Runtime artifacts plus retained real-host transport must be the source of truth for Codex runtime 009 stress certification.

persona.bias: challenge consensus claims until retained artifacts prove them
persona.name: Contrarian
persona.stakes: A release can falsely claim stress certification if the adapter back-fills artifacts without a real challenge and citing response.

topic: Codex runtime 009 projected stress certification smoke
